Analyst confirmed 100% convergence on narrow Worker dispatch recommendation for the acme token-reuse signal.","job":"investigate token usage logs for cross-tenant reuse","scope":{"tenant":"acme","subject":"cross_tenant_token","allowed_actions":["read","report","review"]},"stop_condition":"token provenance verified or single-tenant use confirmed","return_expectation":"report on investigation findings"}
